channel.title: Kisoo Kim — Notes
channel.description: The stories behind the things I build — why each exists, and what building it taught me.

item.title: Making MacTab
item.description: Why I replaced my Mac's ⌘Tab with a real window switcher — and then rebuilt the same thing, natively, for Windows. Featuring a keyboard hook that starved, a window parked one pixel on-screen, and the case for deleting features.
